title: Pricing Analyst- Asia Pacific Region
description:
Requisition ID:
Job Location: Singapore – Jurong Island

To submit application, please click below posting link or copy and paste to a new browser:  

https://chevron.wd5.myworkdayjobs.com/jobs/job/Singapore-Central-Singapore-Singapore/Pricing-Analyst--Asia-Pacific-Region_R000068660

Responsibilities for this position may include but are not limited to:

The Pricing Analyst position plays a critical role in supporting profitability, margin optimization, and sustainable growth within the Asia Pacific region. This role is responsible for executing, and continuously improving pricing strategies, tools, and processes that respond to market dynamics, cost structures, and customer needs. The position works closely with Sales, Finance, Supply Chain, Optimization, and other internal stakeholders to ensure pricing decisions are analytically sound, operationally effective, and strategically aligned.

Responsibilities for this position may include but are not limited to:

  • Support the execution of pricing strategies across the Asia Pacific region by delivering data‑driven insights and pricing recommendations aligned with customer needs, market dynamics, and cost drivers to the Regional Sales team.

  • Work closely with the Sales team, the role analyzes pricing data, monitors market and cost conditions, and supports day‑to‑day pricing decisions to help achieve margin and volume objectives.

  • Develop and maintain pricing models, dashboards, and reports that improve visibility into pricing performance, margins, and market trends.

  • Contributes to the continuous improvement of pricing processes and tools by identifying trends, supporting automation or process enhancements, and ensuring pricing structures and governance are applied consistently and accurately.

Job Requirements

  • Bachelor’s degree as minimum education, preferably in Business, Finance or related

  • Demonstrated ability to gather, manipulate, analyze data to draw valid conclusions

  • Exceptional problem solving, analytical and critical thinking skills

  • Proficient in project management, with strong challenging status quo mindset to drive improvement

  • Ability to proactively identify improvement opportunities to existing processes

  • Strong commercial acumen, able to connect from data analysis to market insight and to business/ pricing action

  • Excellent interpersonal and communication skills

  • Proficiency with PowerBI, Power Automate and Sharepoint

Preferred Qualifications

  • Pricing experience and knowledge of pricing systems is an advantage

  • Proficiency with Python and Data Science techniques and tools are an advantage

postedCompany.description:
Chevron Oronite is a leading developer, manufacturer and marketer of fuel and lubricants additives, and our Singapore branch is a key part of Oronite’s global operations serving as its Asia Pacific headquarters, strategically leveraging on the country’s excellent connectivity and logistics infrastructure and its highly educated and technical workforce.


Our largest lubricant additives manufacturing facility in all of Asia is at Sakra Road on Jurong Island, a prominent energy and chemicals hub. This plant manufactures high-quality additives that enhance the performance of fuels and lubricants products and are shipped throughout the region and beyond to various distributions points worldwide.


Chevron Oronite hires across our entire business platform, but we focus more heavily on disciplines in the fields of product formation and development, commercialization, manufacturing, and supply chain management.


Who We Hire:


• Professionals with all experience levels with technical or non-technical degrees

• Team oriented and can handle exciting technical environments


What We Offer:


• Comprehensive and competitive remuneration that are made up of short and long-term components.

• Hybrid work from home option available, depending on job function

• Ongoing learning and career development
postedCompany.name: CHEVRON ORONITE PTE LTD
